items.title: UPQODE SEO Agreement Coming for Signature
items.summary: Val from UPQODE is preparing the formal agreement based on the SEO/AEO action plan discussed. Will confirmed he's ready to get started but hasn't received it yet.
items.actionNeeded: Review and sign the UPQODE agreement once it arrives.

items.title: AI Implementation Strategy Review Scheduled Friday
items.summary: Joe McVeen scheduled a follow-up session for Friday, June 26 at 3:30 PM EST to present a comprehensive AI operations plan for VYVE's seven-star customer journey and revenue optimization.
items.actionNeeded: Attend Friday's meeting to review the AI strategy plan.

items.title: Homepage Messaging and Design Session Friday
items.summary: Influex scheduled a working session for Friday, June 26 at 2 PM to discuss messaging and design for the VYVE homepage with Angela, Dmitriy, and Tariq.
items.actionNeeded: Attend Friday's homepage design meeting with Influex team.

items.title: Vibrant Wellness Exploring Improved Pricing
items.summary: Emma from Vibrant Wellness confirmed a July 6 meeting to explore potential improvements to standalone pricing following Emily's initial conversation.
items.actionNeeded: Prepare for July 6 pricing discussion with Vibrant Wellness.

items.title: Interview Valet Seeking Replacement Interview
items.summary: Christina from Interview Valet confirmed cancellation and offered to search for a replacement podcast interview opportunity aligned with Dr. Will's schedule if desired.
items.actionNeeded: Decide whether to pursue a replacement podcast interview opportunity.
